title: (Last Sparta Remix) PoopSlammer's Sparta Remixes Are Doomed!
description:
M'kay. This is it. My last one, because I'm done with Sparta Remixes. 

BUT, every once and a while I get bored as hell and make one, and you can usually find those on http://www.youtube.com/user/TheSpartaMaster . Yeup, I'm him.
